metadata.implementation_contract: artifact_channel=off and artifact_arm=A0 return to the published BoundaryAtlasModel path before declaration emission, conformance, stake settlement, tax burn, escrow return/burn, or artifact audit metrics run.
metadata.mode: engineering equivalence; not a scientific outcome

outcome_branches.FAIL: Any missing row or field mismatch; stop FW-3 and report, do not silently fix.
outcome_branches.INCONCLUSIVE: Only for harness/prereg infrastructure failure before an engineering comparison is possible.
outcome_branches.PASS: All selected headline rows exactly equal the committed J-G1 snapshot; proceed to J-N7/J-N7b preregistration drafts.

metadata.question: Do bonded artifact-channel neutral defaults exactly preserve committed J-G1 headline summary cells?
metadata.what_was_not_shown: This gate does not evaluate F1/P0/P1-low/P1-high or scientific bonded-envelope hypotheses.

threshold_change_rationale.seeds: Engineering equivalence intentionally reuses the committed J-G1 deterministic seed block 16000-16079 to compare the same headline cells; this is not the new J-N7/J-N7b scientific seed block.
